claim: No Stable, release, conformance, complete manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: A labelled role=menubar owns native button elements exposed as top-level menuitems and React Aria child menus.
semantics.rolePolicy: Exactly one enabled top-level menuitem is tabbable; child menus retain standard menu and selection semantics.

keyboard.behavior: Moves between enabled top-level menus in logical direction.
Moves to an edge menu or matching label.
Closes the active menu and restores focus to its top-level item.

nonColor: Text, native state, structure, symbols, or explicit labels accompany every Green, Violet, or status signal.
responsive: Logical properties, safe-area-aware containment, wrapping, and scoped overflow preserve operation at 320 CSS pixels, RTL, and 400% zoom; manual evidence remains incomplete.
consumerResponsibilities: Provide concise localized accessible names, descriptions, actions, alternatives, and status text.
Preserve native elements, relationships, logical order, and documented dismissal and focus-restoration behavior when composing or styling.
Retest long content, RTL, zoom, touch, forced colors, reduced motion, and assistive technology for consumer-specific content.
Do not claim Stable or complete conformance until every promotion delta has current evidence.
